description: Build QuantSync (Twitter/X + Threads + Reddit hybrid with anonymous feeds) and QuantAds (ecosystem-wide advertising platform). These are built together as QuantAds is the monetization layer for QuantSync's feed.
steps: Create apps/quantsync/package.json and apps/quantsync/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantsync/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/auth.ts - QuantMail SSO + anonymous mode toggle
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/posts.ts - Create/edit/delete posts (text, media, polls, threads), repost, quote
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/feed.ts - Personalized feed, trending, for-you algorithm, chronological, anonymous feed
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/communities.ts - Create/join communities (like subreddits), moderation, rules, flairs
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/interactions.ts - Upvote/downvote, comments, replies, likes, bookmarks, shares
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/trending.ts - Trending topics, hashtags, explore, search
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/spaces.ts - Live audio rooms (like Twitter Spaces)
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/anonymous.ts - Anonymous posting, confessions, secrets feed
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/ai.ts - AI content suggestions, fact-checking, content moderation, trending analysis
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/notifications.ts - Notification preferences and delivery
Create apps/quantsync/api/controllers/ - All controllers with business logic
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/feed-service.ts - Feed algorithm, ranking, personalization
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/moderation-service.ts - Content moderation, spam detection, reports
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/search-service.ts - Full-text search, hashtag indexing
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/ai-service.ts - AI-powered features using packages/ai
Create apps/quantsync/src/types/index.ts - QuantSync types
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/index.tsx - Main feed (for-you / following / anonymous)
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/post/[id].tsx - Single post with comments thread
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/compose.tsx - Post composer with media/polls/threads
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/communities.tsx - Community discovery and listing
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/community/[id].tsx - Single community view
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/trending.tsx - Trending topics and explore
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/spaces.tsx - Live audio spaces
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/anonymous.tsx - Anonymous feed mode
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/profile/[id].tsx - User profile with posts/replies/media
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/search.tsx - Search results page
Create apps/quantsync/src/pages/notifications.tsx - Notifications center
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/PostCard.tsx - Post with actions (upvote, comment, share, repost)
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/CommentThread.tsx - Nested comment thread
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/TrendingSidebar.tsx - Trending topics widget
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/CommunityCard.tsx - Community preview card
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/SpaceRoom.tsx - Live audio space UI
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/PostComposer.tsx - Rich post editor
Create apps/quantsync/src/components/FeedToggle.tsx - Feed mode switcher
Create apps/quantsync/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
--- QuantAds ---
Create apps/quantads/package.json and apps/quantads/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantads/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/campaigns.ts - Create/manage ad campaigns, budgets, scheduling, A/B testing
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/creatives.ts - Upload/manage ad creatives (image, video, carousel, interactive)
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/targeting.ts - Audience targeting (demographics, interests, behavior, retargeting, lookalike)
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/bidding.ts - Real-time bidding, CPM/CPC/CPA models, auction system
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/analytics.ts - Campaign analytics, impressions, clicks, conversions, ROI, reports
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/placements.ts - Ad placement configuration across all 9 apps
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/billing.ts - Advertiser billing, invoices, payment methods, spending limits
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/ai.ts - AI ad optimization, creative generation, audience prediction
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/policies.ts - Ad review, policy compliance, approval workflow
Create apps/quantads/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantads/api/services/auction-service.ts - Real-time ad auction engine
Create apps/quantads/api/services/targeting-service.ts - Audience matching and segmentation
Create apps/quantads/api/services/analytics-service.ts - Tracking, attribution, reporting
Create apps/quantads/api/services/ai-service.ts - AI optimization using packages/ai
Create apps/quantads/api/services/delivery-service.ts - Ad delivery across ecosystem apps
Create apps/quantads/src/types/index.ts - QuantAds types
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/index.tsx - Ads manager dashboard
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/campaigns.tsx - Campaign listing and management
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/campaign/[id].tsx - Campaign detail with analytics
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/create-campaign.tsx - Campaign creation wizard
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/creatives.tsx - Creative library and builder
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/audiences.tsx - Audience builder and management
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/analytics.tsx - Full analytics dashboard with charts
Create apps/quantads/src/pages/billing.tsx - Billing and payment management
Create apps/quantads/src/components/CampaignCard.tsx - Campaign overview card
Create apps/quantads/src/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx - Charts for impressions, clicks, conversions
Create apps/quantads/src/components/AudienceBuilder.tsx - Visual audience targeting builder
Create apps/quantads/src/components/CreativePreview.tsx - Ad creative preview across formats
Create apps/quantads/src/components/BudgetOptimizer.tsx - AI budget optimization widget
Create apps/quantads/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
acceptance_criteria: QuantSync has full posting system (text, media, polls, threads, anonymous posts)
Feed algorithm with multiple modes (for-you, following, anonymous, chronological) exists
Communities with moderation, rules, and flairs are implemented
Interaction system (upvote/downvote, comments, replies, shares, bookmarks) is complete
Anonymous mode with identity-hidden posting works
QuantAds has full campaign management (create, edit, budget, schedule, A/B test)
Targeting engine with demographics, interests, behavior, retargeting exists
Analytics dashboard with impressions, clicks, conversions, ROI reporting exists
Ad delivery service can serve ads to all ecosystem apps
AI optimization for both content (QuantSync) and ads (QuantAds) is integrated
findings: Both apps built successfully with 92 files (47 QuantSync + 41 QuantAds + 4 config). Node.js cannot run in this environment due to proxy-bootstrap.js preload issue (pre-existing infra problem also present in FEAT-003). All verification file counts exceed requirements. Feed algorithm uses Wilson score interval + engagement scoring + diversity filtering. Auction service uses second-price auction with quality score weighting.
